name: verify_initial_access
description: DHARMARAJ must independently reproduce the claimed initial access vector
expectation: An actual command was executed to reproduce the initial access (not just read from the report)

name: verify_lateral_movement
description: Each lateral movement hop must be independently confirmed
expectation: Each claimed hop has its own verification command and output

name: verify_privilege_escalation
description: Privilege escalation claims must show before/after access levels
expectation: Shows pre-escalation and post-escalation access with proof commands

name: adversarial_probe
description: At least one adversarial probe attempted per finding
expectation: At least one alternative technique or evasion method tested per finding

name: kill_chain_gaps
description: Identifies gaps in multi-step attack chains
expectation: Any missing steps between attack phases are explicitly noted

name: false_positive_identification
expectation: Findings that cannot be independently reproduced are marked FALSE_POSITIVE with reason

name: verdict_present
expectation: Output ends with VERDICT: and PASS_RATE: lines
